scoringPlays.text: Jalen Moss 19 Yd pass from Mikey Keene (Dylan Lynch Kick)
Jaelen Gill 42 Yd pass from Mikey Keene (Dylan Lynch Kick)

videos.headline: Fresno State extends lead after Mikey Keene's 42-yard TD
videos.description: Fresno State QB Mikey Keene lobs it to Jaelen Gill, who makes the grab, shakes off defender and runs to the end zone for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Fresno State extends lead after Mikey Keene's 42-yard TD) 2023/09/17 ESHEET
